summary: Bug fix verification complete: Bank account dropdown in PreventivoEditorPage now works correctly. The fix changed line 143 from apiRequest('/company/') to apiRequest('/company/settings'). All backend and frontend tests pass.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option> - caused by DevTools instrumentation, not app code

bug_fix_bank_dropdown.GET /api/company/: PASS - Returns 404 (confirming old broken endpoint doesn't exist)
bug_fix_bank_dropdown.Data persistence: PASS - GET after PUT returns saved bank_accounts
bug_fix_bank_dropdown.Frontend dropdown: PASS - Bank dropdown populated from /api/company/settings with 2 test bank accounts

success_rate.frontend: 100% (bank dropdown verified populated with bank accounts)

test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test session test_session_iter107_1772519225427
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test bank accounts during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: PreventivoEditorPage.js line 143 now calls apiRequest('/company/settings') instead of the broken apiRequest('/company/'). The Settings page (SettingsPage.js line 65) was already correct. Bank accounts are saved to MongoDB via PUT /api/company/settings and retrieved via GET /api/company/settings. The dropdown on the Pagamento tab (data-testid='select-banca') correctly displays bank accounts from the bankAccounts state.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: PreventivoEditorPage.js was calling a non-existent endpoint /api/company/ instead of the correct /api/company/settings
reproduction_steps: 1. Open a new or existing preventivo
3. Observe the Conto Corrente dropdown was empty
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 143 from apiRequest('/company/') to apiRequest('/company/settings')
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Bank dropdown now shows bank accounts saved in company settings
